verdict.note: real Vite dev server ×3 starts, identifiable tiny backends: (1) API_URL=A with spexcode.json apiUrl=B present → BACKEND-A answers (env wins); (2) no env, json apiUrl=B via walk-up → BACKEND-B answers; (3) neither → the proxied /api/board returns the live :8787 spexcode dogfood board (default localhost:8787). WS rides the same proxy (ws:true in vite.config.js).
